checks.name: native_unit_template
checks.raw_stdout:
# /etc/systemd/system/wanctl@.service
[Unit]
Description=wanctl Adaptive CAKE Autorate Daemon - %i
Documentation=https://github.com/kevinb361/wanctl
After=network-online.target systemd-networkd-wait-online.service wanctl-nic-tuning.service
Wants=network-online.target wanctl-nic-tuning.service
StartLimitBurst=5
StartLimitIntervalSec=300

[Service]
Type=simple
User=wanctl
Group=wanctl
WorkingDirectory=/opt/wanctl
ExecStart=/usr/bin/python3 /opt/wanctl/autorate_continuous.py --config /etc/wanctl/%i.yaml
Restart=on-failure
RestartSec=5s
WatchdogSec=30s
Environment=PYTHONPATH=/opt
Environment=WANCTL_STATE_DIR=/var/lib/wanctl
Environment=WANCTL_LOG_DIR=/var/log/wanctl
Environment=WANCTL_RUN_DIR=/run/wanctl
EnvironmentFile=-/etc/wanctl/secrets
StandardOutput=journal
StandardError=journal
SyslogIdentifier=wanctl-%i
AmbientCapabilities=CAP_NET_RAW CAP_NET_ADMIN
NoNewPrivileges=yes

# Filesystem protection
ProtectSystem=strict
ProtectHome=yes
PrivateTmp=yes
PrivateDevices=yes
ReadWritePaths=/var/lib/wanctl /var/log/wanctl /run/wanctl

# Kernel protection
ProtectKernelTunables=yes
ProtectKernelModules=yes
ProtectKernelLogs=yes
ProtectControlGroups=yes
ProtectClock=yes
LockPersonality=yes

# Capability bounding -- only keep what wanctl needs
CapabilityBoundingSet=CAP_NET_RAW CAP_NET_ADMIN

# Namespace and address family restrictions
RestrictNamespaces=yes
RestrictAddressFamilies=AF_INET AF_INET6 AF_UNIX AF_NETLINK
RestrictSUIDSGID=yes
RestrictRealtime=yes

# System call filtering -- block dangerous syscall classes
# Keep @privileged (cap_net_raw), @raw-io (ICMP sockets), @resources (process mgmt)
SystemCallArchitectures=native
SystemCallFilter=~@clock @cpu-emulation @debug @module @mount @obsolete @reboot @swap

# Memory and process
MemoryDenyWriteExecute=yes
UMask=0027

# Process visibility
ProtectProc=invisible
# Keep /proc/net visible: tc reads /proc/net/psched for HTB timing/burst accounting.

# Device ACL -- empty (no device access needed)
DeviceAllow=

# CPU affinity — keep wanctl off CPU 0 (IRQ/system) to reduce scheduling jitter
CPUAffinity=1-2

# Resource limits (updated 2026-04-07: ATT peak=384.7MB hitting old MemoryHigh=384M)
MemoryMax=640M
MemoryHigh=512M
TasksMax=64
LimitNOFILE=1024

[Install]
WantedBy=multi-user.target

checks.name: cake_conflicts_guard
checks.raw_stdout:
# /etc/systemd/system/cake-autorate-att.service
[Unit]
Description=cake-autorate ATT VDSL shaper
Documentation=https://github.com/lynxthecat/cake-autorate
After=network-online.target wanctl-nic-tuning.service
Wants=network-online.target wanctl-nic-tuning.service
Conflicts=wanctl@att.service

[Service]
Type=simple
ExecStartPre=/usr/local/sbin/cake-autorate-att-qdisc-init
ExecStart=/opt/cake-autorate/cake-autorate.sh /etc/cake-autorate/config.att.sh
Restart=on-failure
RestartSec=5s
Environment=CAKE_AUTORATE_SCRIPT_PREFIX=/opt/cake-autorate
Environment=CAKE_AUTORATE_CONFIG_PREFIX=/etc/cake-autorate

[Install]
WantedBy=multi-user.target

checks.name: att_watchdog_template
checks.raw_stdout:
# /etc/systemd/system/silicom-bypass-watchdog@.service
[Unit]
Description=Silicom fail-open bypass watchdog for %i
Requires=bpctl-silicom.service
After=bpctl-silicom.service wanctl@%i.service
Wants=wanctl@%i.service

[Service]
Type=simple
Environment=BPCTL_UTIL=/opt/bpctl-silicom/bpctl_util
Environment=TIMEOUT_MS=5000
Environment=HEARTBEAT_SECONDS=1
EnvironmentFile=/etc/wanctl/bpctl-watchdog/%i.env
ExecStart=/usr/local/sbin/wanctl-bpctl-watchdog-petter
ExecStop=/usr/local/sbin/wanctl-bpctl-watchdog-bypass
TimeoutStopSec=10
Restart=no

[Install]
WantedBy=multi-user.target

return_to_cake_sequence:
sudo systemctl disable --now wanctl@att.service silicom-bypass-watchdog@att.service
sudo systemctl enable --now cake-autorate-att.service cake-autorate-att-state-bridge.service silicom-bypass-watchdog-cake-autorate-att.service
# qdisc re-init is handled by /usr/local/sbin/cake-autorate-att-qdisc-init via ExecStartPre
rollback_sequence:
sudo systemctl disable --now cake-autorate-att.service cake-autorate-att-state-bridge.service silicom-bypass-watchdog-cake-autorate-att.service
sudo systemctl enable --now wanctl@att.service silicom-bypass-watchdog@att.service
sleep 8
cd /opt/bpctl-silicom
sudo ./bpctl_util att-modem set_disc off
sudo ./bpctl_util att-modem set_bypass off
sudo ./bpctl_util att-modem reset_bypass_wd >/dev/null || true
sudo tc qdisc replace dev att-router root cake bandwidth 95Mbit diffserv4 triple-isolate ingress nonat nowash no-ack-filter split-gso rtt 35ms ptm overhead 22 mpu 64 memlimit 32Mb
sudo tc qdisc replace dev att-modem root cake bandwidth 18Mbit diffserv4 triple-isolate egress nonat nowash ack-filter split-gso rtt 35ms ptm overhead 22 mpu 64 memlimit 32Mb
